CustomField.description: Effective Difference is the difference between the MR calculated for TrueUp Utilization and MR Calculated from Actual utilization or previous Trueup Utilization, for a supplemental rent. This field reflects the amount that the invoice/ credit memo would be created for, from Trueup Utilization. Please note, this field may not reflect the right value if the previous Invoice/ Credit Memo is in Pending or Declined status.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Effective Difference is the difference between the MR calculated for TrueUp Utilization and MR Calculated from Actual utilization or previous Trueup Utilization, for a supplemental rent. This field reflects the amount that the invoice/ credit memo would be created for, from Trueup Utilization. Please note, this field may not reflect the right value if the previous Invoice/ Credit Memo is in Pending or Declined status.
CustomField.label: Effective Difference
